title: What the Static Remembers
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A radio engineer fixing a Cold War-era transmitter tower picks up broadcasts of his own childhood—recorded years before his birth—and the signal is changing the present to match them.
long_description: A radio engineer fixing a Cold War-era transmitter tower picks up broadcasts of his own childhood—recorded years before his birth—and the signal is changing the present to match them.
